items.name: Tandoori Shakshuka
items.description: Poached eggs nestled in a bold, tandoori-spiced tomato base. Smoky, spicy, and full of flavour.
items.simplified_description: Poached eggs in spicy tandoori tomato sauce.

items.name: Valeyti Naashta
items.description: Crack it your way - eggs any style with chicken sausage, chicken bacon, hash potatoes, and toast. A proper desi take on the classic English breakfast.
items.simplified_description: Eggs with chicken sausage, bacon, potatoes, and toast.

items.name: Avocado Toast
items.description: Creamy avocado with jalapeños and a touch of honey glaze over sourdough. Sweet heat on toast.
items.simplified_description: Avocado and jalapeños on sourdough toast with honey.

items.name: Breakfast Tacos
items.description: Two tacos stuffed with a fluffy masala omelette, potato hash, and sautéed veggies. Portable desi flavour bombs.
items.simplified_description: Tacos filled with spiced omelette, potatoes, and veggies.

items.name: Classic Breakfast Poutine
items.description: Crispy potato wedges, fresh tomatoes, hollandaise sauce, and poached eggs. Simple and satisfying.
items.simplified_description: Potato wedges with tomatoes, hollandaise, and poached eggs.

items.name: Crispy Chick-In Poutine
items.description: Golden chicken, sunny-side egg, and our secret house sauce served over spiced potato wedges. Crunchy meets creamy.
items.simplified_description: Chicken, egg, and sauce over spiced potato wedges.

items.name: Birria Nihari Poutine
items.description: Slow-braised nihari birria, sunny-side egg, and seasoned wedges. The ultimate brunch-meets-desi fusion.
items.simplified_description: Braised birria, egg, and seasoned potato wedges.

items.name: Birria Nihari Benedict
items.description: Poached eggs on a toasted English muffin, topped with slow-cooked birria nihari & hollandaise. Served with crispy hashed potatoes.
items.simplified_description: Poached eggs with birria and hollandaise on muffin.

items.name: Masala Waffle
items.description: Waffle meets pakora - spiced and crispy, topped with our tangy mint chutney. Desi street vibes, café style.
items.simplified_description: Spiced crispy waffle topped with tangy mint chutney.

items.name: Paneer Bagel
items.description: Toasted bagel stuffed with our signature spiced paneer mix. Served with a side of crispy potato wedges.
items.simplified_description: Bagel filled with spiced paneer and potato wedges.

items.name: Smashed Lacha Burger (Beef or Aloo Tikki)
items.description: Your choice of juicy smashed beef patty or crispy aloo tikki, layered with sauces and our signature lacha paratha bun.
items.simplified_description: Burger with beef or potato patty and lacha paratha bun.

items.name: Keema Egg-Nest Paratha
items.description: Golden paratha “nest” holding two eggs, finished with a generous topping of our spiced keema.
items.simplified_description: Paratha with two eggs and spiced keema topping.

items.name: Rose Milk Pancakes
items.description: Fluffy rose milk pancakes topped with floral syrup and crushed rose petals. Pretty, pink, and dreamy.
items.simplified_description: Fluffy pancakes with rose syrup and rose petals.

items.name: Pista Pancakes
items.description: Pillowy pancakes layered with pistachio cream, chopped nuts, and a touch of cardamom. Nutty & nostalgic.
items.simplified_description: Pancakes with pistachio cream and chopped nuts.

items.name: Cocoa Pancakes
items.description: Decadent cocoa pancakes drizzled with rich chocolate. A chocolate lover's dream.
items.simplified_description: Rich cocoa pancakes drizzled with chocolate sauce.

items.name: Karak Chai Toast Drip
items.description: French toast soaked in our signature Karak chai and drizzled with chai. Soft, spiced, and golden.
items.simplified_description: French toast soaked in spiced Karak chai and drizzled with chai syrup.

items.name: Kunafa Crush
items.description: Crispy kunafa-coated French toast layered with pistachio and chocolate sauce, topped with ice cream. Dessert for breakfast? Always.
items.simplified_description: French toast with crispy kunafa, pistachio, chocolate sauce, and ice cream.

items.name: Lotus Drip
items.description: Waffle topped with Lotus crumble, ice cream, and a waffle cone. It's sweet, messy, and totally worth it.
items.simplified_description: Waffle topped with Lotus crumble, ice cream, and a waffle cone.

items.name: Gingerbread Cloud Pancakes
items.description: Classic gingerbread flavours folded into a soft pancake stack, finished with a spiced syrup.
items.simplified_description: Soft pancakes with gingerbread flavors and spiced syrup.
